title: 3.4 - Retry & Error Classification
description: Status-code retry per code (429/502/503/504). Connect vs stall timeout SEPARATED (9router: first-chunk timeout dead code). URL fallback chain. Network error enum: ECONNRESET, ETIMEDOUT, EPIPE, UND_ERR_SOCKET. Jittered exponential backoff. Max retries per URL + overall limit. Files: src/executor/retry.rs. 9router fixes: retry error message lost on non-ok response (always capture).
close_reason: Implemented and verified. Codebase has feature with tests passing.

title: 1.4 - Response Translation & SSE Streaming
description:
Response Translation & SSE Streaming

## Scope
Translate upstream response chunks to client format. SSE transform stream with usage extraction.

## Subtasks
1. SSE event parser: parse lines, reconstruct JSON chunks, handle buffer boundaries
2. Response translator dispatch: target->source format conversion (reverse of request)
3. SINGLE [DONE] sentinel — 9router bug: DOUBLE [DONE] in translate AND passthrough modes
4. Token usage extraction from ALL formats with fallback estimation
5. Streaming handler: pipe provider Response through SSE transform to client
6. Non-streaming handler: SSE-to-JSON when provider forces streaming
7. Buffer size limit (prevent OOM from pathological provider chunks)
8. Cache-control-aware usage: buffer 2000 tokens to prevent context window errors

## CRITICAL 9router Fixes
- DOUBLE [DONE] sentinel: transform() emits one, flush() emits another. Fix: single emit with completion flag.
- toolArgBuffers Map not initialized: tool call arguments can vanish during streaming. Fix: pre-initialize.
- Error swallowing in flush(): all errors caught and logged but not propagated. Fix: controller.error() on failure.
- usage filter uses sourceFormat instead of post-translation format: non-OpenAI clients get empty usage. Fix: filter after translation.
- Gemini thoughtsTokenCount into prompt_tokens: misclassifies thinking as input. Fix: prepend to completion_tokens.

## Files
- src/stream/sse.rs — SSE line parser + serializer
- src/stream/transform.rs — Transform stream implementation
- src/stream/handler.rs — Streaming handler
- src/stream/json_handler.rs — SSE-to-JSON for non-streaming path
close_reason: Implemented and verified. Codebase has feature with tests passing.

title: 5.3 - Export/Import
description: Export ALL scopes (including disabledModels). Import replaces scopes + deletes orphans. Password hash + OIDC secret in export. Files: src/db/export.rs. 9router fixes: disabledModels not exported, orphaned rows on import.
close_reason: Implemented and verified. Codebase has feature with tests passing.

title: 5.1 - Database Layer

Files: src/db/mod.rs, src/db/encrypted.rs, src/db/migrations.rs. 9router fixes: sql.js zero locking, debounced 100ms writes lose data, process.on(beforeExit) without .once accumulates handlers, plaintext secrets.
close_reason: Implemented and verified. Codebase has feature with tests passing.

title: 3.3 - Specialized OAuth Executors
description: GitHub Copilot: token exchange, /chat/completions gating, /responses blocked for claude. Cursor: protobuf wire format (low-level http2), gzip frames. Kiro: free tier, device code flow. Antigravity: Gemini wrapper, project ID resolution. Codex: Responses API SSE. Files: src/executor/github.rs, src/executor/cursor.rs, src/executor/kiro.rs, src/executor/antigravity.rs, src/executor/codex.rs. 9router fixes: github mutates body in-place before sanitize (clone first), cursor COMPRESS_FLAG dead code.
close_reason: Implemented and verified.

title: 4.2 - Dashboard Authentication
description: bcrypt password hashing. JWT with Strict SameSite. Persistent rate limiting (9router: in-memory resets on restart). Password reset invalidates ALL sessions. Force change on first login. Files: src/auth/dashboard.rs, src/auth/jwt.rs, src/auth/rate_limit.rs. 9router fixes: timing attack on === short-circuit (use crypto::eq), reset sets null->default 123456, lax SameSite, resets on restart.
close_reason: Implemented and verified.

title: 2.3 - Account Fallback & Model-Level Locking
description:
Account Fallback & Model-Level Locking

## Scope
Model-level error handling with exponential backoff. Error classification: should_fallback vs non-recoverable. Rate limit cascade prevention.

## Subtasks
1. Model-level locking: modelLock_{model} timestamps per connection
2. Account-level lock fallback: modelLock___all when no specific model
3. Exponential backoff cooldown with CORRECT doubling (9router: off-by-one, level 0 and 1 both 2s)
4. Clear lock on successful request + lazy cleanup of expired locks
5. Error classification: should_fallback vs non-recoverable (400/404 should NOT fallback)
6. 429 TRANSIENT COOLDOWN before next combo model (9router: no delay = cascade)
7. Error text matching with ERROR_RULES config (substring-based, top-to-bottom priority)

## CRITICAL 9router Fixes
- shouldFallback ALWAYS true: default branch returns shouldFallback=true for ALL unmatched errors. Fix: 400/404/500 return false.
- Dead rateLimitedUntil field: active locking writes modelLock_*, not rateLimitedUntil. Fix: use only modelLock_* fields.
- Backoff off-by-one: getQuotaCooldown(max(0, level-1)). Fix: base * 2^level with no offset.
- 429 cascade with NO delay between combo models. Fix: apply cooldownMs before next model.
- filterAvailableAccounts checks rateLimitedUntil which is never written. Fix: use isModelLockActive.

## Files
- src/fallback/error.rs — ErrorRule matching, should_fallback logic
- src/fallback/backoff.rs — Exponential backoff calculation
- src/fallback/lock.rs — ModelLock read/write
- src/fallback/clear.rs — ClearAccountError + lazy cleanup

## Tests
- 429 triggers fallback with cooldown
- 400 (Bad Request) does NOT fallback
- Model lock prevents selection on next request
- Clear on success removes model lock
- Expired locks auto-cleaned
- Rate limit cascade prevented with delay
close_reason: Implemented and verified. Codebase has feature with tests passing.

title: 6.1 - RTK Token Compression
description: Compress tool_result per format (git diff, grep, ls, tree). Auto-detect format. Safe filter (catch panics, return original). Caveman/Ponytail prompt injection. Headroom external proxy integration. Files: src/rtk/detector.rs, src/rtk/filters/mod.rs, src/rtk/injector.rs. 9router fixes: safeApply drops async results (sync check only), unused parameters.
close_reason: Implemented and verified. Codebase has feature with tests passing.

title: 1.5 - Stream Controller & Connection Management
description:
Stream Controller & Connection Management

## Scope
Manage HTTP streaming connections with cancellation, stall detection, and cleanup.

## Subtasks
1. Stream controller with AbortController-based cancellation
2. Byte-level stall watchdog: measure upstream bytes, NOT transform output (9router fix: reasoning models pause SSE output)
3. Graceful terminal synthesis: Responses API response.failed + [DONE] on abort
4. Reader.cancel() + writer.abort() with await on cleanup paths (9router bug: unhandled promises)
5. Buffer size cap (prevent OOM from huge SSE lines)
6. Shared stateless encoder (TextEncoder)

## CRITICAL 9router Fixes
- Stall timeout race: timer callback runs handleError after stream already completed. Fix: guard timer with boolean flag.
- cancel() returns void without awaiting cleanup: unhandled promise rejections. Fix: await both paths.
- wrappedController bypass: stall timeout calls controller directly instead of wrapped methods. Fix: call wrapped methods.
- StreamHandler error.name without null guard: TypeError if non-Error thrown. Fix: optional chaining.

## Files
- src/stream/controller.rs — StreamController struct
- src/stream/stall.rs — Stall watchdog
- src/stream/disconnect.rs — Disconnect detection + cleanup
close_reason: Implemented and verified. Codebase has feature with tests passing.

title: 5.2 - Usage Tracking & Cost
description: Extract usage from ALL formats. Normalize to canonical fields. Cost: subtract cached_tokens AND cache_creation (9router: double-counted). Fallback estimation. Persist ALL fields (cached, reasoning, cache_read, cache_creation). Functional observability toggle. Files: src/usage/extractor.rs, src/usage/cost.rs, src/usage/persistence.rs. 9router fixes: cache_creation_input_tokens double-counted, saveUsageStats drops fields, appendRequestLog no-op, enableObservability2 typo.
close_reason: Implemented and verified. Codebase has feature with tests passing.

title: 2.4 - Combo & Fusion
description:
Combo & Fusion

## Scope
Multi-model strategies: sequential fallback, round-robin rotation, parallel fusion with judge synthesis.

## Subtasks
1. Combo definition: sequential model list from user config
2. FALLBACK strategy: try models in order, retry transient (502/503/504) with cooldown delay
3. ROUND-ROBIN strategy: rotate through models with sticky limit, track rotation state
4. FUSION strategy: parallel panel executors, quorum-grace collection, judge synthesis
5. Quorum-grace: min N panel responses -> short grace window for stragglers -> proceed
6. Fusion timeout: AbortController CANCELS in-flight requests on timeout (9router: leaks HTTP requests)
7. Lone-survivor fusion: use the ONE successful panel response directly (9router: re-requests model = double cost)
8. Capability auto-switch: detect vision/pdf/search requirements, reorder models to front
9. flattenToolHistory: convert tool turns to prose but assign role:user (9router: role:assistant creates consecutive assistants)

## CRITICAL 9router Fixes
- Fusion timeout LEAKS in-flight HTTP requests: no AbortController passed. Fix: pass cancel signal.
- Lone-survivor discards panel response, re-requests model. Fix: return existing response directly.
- flattenToolHistory creates consecutive assistant roles (tool->assistant). Fix: assign role:user or merge.
- Rotation state migration path incomplete: old {index} format causes NaN. Fix: check both formats.
- checkFallbackError in combo called WITHOUT backoffLevel. Fix: propagate backoff level.
- 429 cascade no delay. Fix: apply cooldownMs before next model.

## Files
- src/combo/strategy.rs — ComboStrategy enum + dispatch
- src/combo/fallback.rs — Sequential fallback
- src/combo/round_robin.rs — Round-robin with rotation state
- src/combo/fusion.rs — Parallel panel + judge synthesis
- src/combo/capability.rs — Required capabilities detection

## Tests
- Fallback tries models in order, stops on success
- Round-robin distributes evenly with sticky limit
- Fusion panel timeout cancels in-flight requests
- Lone-survivor returns existing result (no re-request)
- Capability auto-switch reorders vision models for image requests
- Rate limit delay prevents cascade
close_reason: Implemented and verified. Codebase has feature with tests passing.

title: 2.1 - Provider Credential Management
description:
Provider Credential Management

## Scope
Manage per-provider credentials with encrypted storage. Multi-account strategies and thread-safe selection.

## Subtasks
1. Credential storage: provider_id, auth_type (api_key, oauth, device_code), encrypted tokens, metadata
2. Fill-first strategy: sort by priority, pick first available
3. Round-robin with sticky limit: N consecutive requests to same account before rotating
4. Thread-safe account selection with tokio::sync::Mutex (not Promise-based: 9router mutex stuck bug)
5. Mutex MUST resolve in all paths: success, error, panic (9router: finally block missing)
6. Per-provider strategy overrides (fill-first per provider, round-robin per another)

## 9router CRITICAL Fixes
- Mutex stuck on exception: resolveMutex never called. Fix: use tokio::sync::Mutex RAII guard.
- Race between account selection and lock write: selected, then locked outside mutex. Fix: lock inside transaction.
- _connection live reference: concurrent updateProviderConnection causes stale reads. Fix: deep clone or read-latest.
- appending consecutiveUseCount outside mutex: clearAccountError/markAccountUnavailable bypass mutex. Fix: all writes through guarded methods.

## Files
- src/credentials/mod.rs — CredentialManager struct + strategies
- src/credentials/storage.rs — Encrypted storage (delegates to DB layer)
- src/credentials/selection.rs — Account selection algorithms

## Tests
- Fill-first picks highest priority available account
- Round-robin distributes evenly with sticky limit
- Mutex resolves in error path (inject panic in selection)
- Concurrent selection returns different accounts
close_reason: Implemented and verified. Codebase has feature with tests passing.

description: Env proxy: HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY/ALL_PROXY/NO_PROXY wildcard matching. Connection-level proxy override. Vercel relay: x-relay-target+path headers. MITM DNS bypass via Google DNS for known hosts. EXACT hostname match (not includes: 9router bug). Default GET method (9router: hardcoded POST). Case-insensitive Headers (9router: returns Map). Files: src/proxy/mod.rs, src/proxy/dns_bypass.rs, src/proxy/vercel_relay.rs. 9router fixes: evil-api.githubcopilot.com substring match, default POST, abort signal not passed to https.request.

title: 1.2 - Format Detection & Translation Pipeline
description:
Format Detection & Translation Pipeline

## Scope
Detect API format from endpoint path + request body shape. Dispatch translation through typed registry.

## Subtasks
1. Format enum: OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, GeminiCli, OpenAIResponses, Vertex, Codex, Antigravity, Kiro, Cursor, Ollama, CommandCode
2. fn detect_format(endpoint, body_headers, body_json) -> Format — rules-based detection
3. Translator registry dispatching by (source, target) tuple
4. Translation pipeline: detect -> resolve -> translate (direct or pivot through OpenAI)
5. Response symmetry enforcement: every request translator MUST have matching response translator
6. Source format override via endpoint path (/v1/messages -> Claude, /v1/responses -> Responses)

## Detection Rules (fixed from 9router)
- /v1/responses -> OpenAI Responses
- /v1/messages -> Claude
- body.anthropic_version -> Claude (check BEFORE messages heuristics)
- body.contents[] -> Gemini/Antigravity
- User-Agent is HTTP HEADER not body field (9router bug: reads body.userAgent)
- model string with / does NOT exclude Claude (9router bug: body.model.includes("/") blocks it)

## Files
- src/format.rs — Format enum + detection
- src/translator/mod.rs — TranslatorRegistry, dispatch
- src/translator/registry.rs — Registry builder

## Tests
- /v1/messages with Claude body -> Claude
- /v1/responses -> OpenAIResponses
- /v1/chat/completions with messages[] + anthropic_version -> Claude (NOT OpenAI)
- Gemini contents[] -> Gemini
- Unknown defaults -> OpenAI

## 9router CRITICAL Bugs Fixed
- Pure-text Claude without body.system misclassified as OpenAI
- body.model.includes("/") blocks Claude detection for antigravity/claude-sonnet
- body.userAgent read as body field instead of HTTP header
close_reason: Implemented and verified. Codebase has feature with tests passing.

title: 3.2 - Default / OpenAI-Compatible Executor
description: OpenAI chat completions + responses endpoints. Anthropic-compatible (x-api-key + Bearer dual auth). Gemini-format (streamGenerateContent). json_schema->json_object fallback. Provider quirks: drop client_metadata, strip unsupported params. Files: src/executor/default.rs, src/executor/gemini.rs, src/executor/anthropic_compat.rs. 9router fixes: credentials.runtimeTransport mutate (clone before use), stale translatedBody in retry (re-translate after refresh).
close_reason: Implemented and verified. Codebase has feature with tests passing.

title: 1.3 - Request Translation (All Format Pairs)
description:
Request Translation (All Format Pairs)

## Scope
Implement 12 request translators for all supported format pairs. Each translator converts source body to target body.

## Translators
1. OpenAI -> Claude: role mapping (developer->system), tool_use/tool_result, images, thinking, cache_control, max_tokens preserved
2. Claude -> OpenAI: system message, tool_use->tool_calls, tool_result->role:tool, thinking STRIPPED (OpenAI doesn't support)
3. Gemini -> OpenAI: contents->messages, functionCall->tool_calls, thought/thinking blocks PRESERVED (9router bug: dropped)
4. OpenAI -> Gemini: messages->contents, system->system_instruction, tools->toolConfig, MULTIPLE tool results (9router bug: only first preserved)
5. OpenAI -> Kiro: proprietary format, max_tokens PRESERVED (9router bug: hardcoded 32000)
6. OpenAI -> Cursor: JSON format for protobuf, max_tokens PRESERVED (9router bug: replaced with minimum)
7. OpenAI -> Ollama: message format, tool_calls WITHOUT index field (9router bug: preserves index)
8. OpenAI -> CommandCode: tool result with tool_name mapping (9router bug: empty)
9-11: Antigravity, OpenAI Responses, misc
12: OpenAI->OpenAI (passthrough with normalization)

## CRITICAL 9router Fixes
- Developer role SILENTLY DROPPED -> map to system
- max_tokens HARDCODED 32000 (kiro) or replaced with minimum (cursor) -> preserve from request
- Tool call argument parse failure sends raw string -> fallback to {}
- Multiple functionResponse parts -> iterate ALL parts
- Thinking blocks dropped in gemini/claude translators -> preserve
- Multiple system messages overwritten -> concatenate all
- Tool result tool_name always empty -> build call_id-to-name mapping

## Files
- src/translator/request/openai_to_claude.rs
- src/translator/request/claude_to_openai.rs
- etc (one file per translator)

## Test Strategy
- Round-trip: translate(source->target), translate(target->source), verify no data loss
- Every content block type tested (text, image, tool_use, tool_result, thinking)
- max_tokens field MUST survive translation unchanged
close_reason: Implemented and verified. Codebase has feature with tests passing.

title: 2.2 - Token Refresh & OAuth
description:
Token Refresh & OAuth

## Scope
Per-provider OAuth token refresh with retry, dedup, and edge case handling.

## Subtasks
1. Refresh dispatch table: provider -> refresh function
2. Jittered exponential backoff retry (not linear: 9router uses 1s/2s/3s with no jitter)
3. Refresh dedup: cache IN-FLIGHT Promise, not null result (9router: caches null for 10s, defeats retry)
4. Unrecoverable error detection: invalid_grant, refresh_token_reused -> STOP retry immediately
5. Vertex JWT minting with in-memory cache + TTL (thread-safe, atomic read+write)
6. getAllAccessTokens passes ALL connection fields including providerSpecificData (9router: drops it, breaks Kiro)

## 9router CRITICAL Fixes
- dedup caches null for 10s: executor.refreshCredentials returns null on network error, cached. Fix: only cache SUCCESS.
- Object.assign race on credentials: concurrent 401 requests race on same object. Fix: clone-then-swap.
- getAllAccessTokens drops providerSpecificData: Kiro needs clientId/secret/region. Fix: pass all fields.
- vertex unreachable via getAccessToken: guard checks refreshToken string type, vertex uses apiKey. Fix: per-provider guard.
- vertexTokenCache not thread-safe: concurrent minting overwrites each other. Fix: tokio::sync::RwLock.

## Files
- src/auth/refresh.rs — Refresh dispatcher + per-provider implementations
- src/auth/dedup.rs — Concurrent refresh deduplication
- src/auth/vertex.rs — Vertex JWT minting with cache

## Tests
- Successful refresh returns new tokens
- Null result NOT cached (retries work)
- Unrecoverable error stops retry
- Concurrent refresh returns same result
- Vertex cache doesn't double-mint
close_reason: Implemented and verified. Codebase has feature with tests passing.

Connection vs stream stall timeout. title: 4.3 - SSRF Protection
description: Block private IPs. IPv4-mapped IPv6 (::ffff:127.0.0.1). Decimal IP (2130706433). Shorthand IP (127.1). DNS rebinding protection. Public host allowlist. Files: src/security/ssrf.rs. 9router fixes: bypass via decimal IP, ::ffff:127.0.0.1, shorthand, IPv6.
close_reason: Implemented and verified. Codebase has feature with tests passing.

title: 1.1 - Model Parsing & Provider Resolution
description:
Model Parsing & Provider Resolution

## Scope
Parse model strings (provider/model format) into typed enum + model name. Entry point of every request.

## Subtasks
1. Define ProviderId enum with all providers (anthropic, openai, gemini, kiro, github, cursor, codex, etc.)
2. Implement parse_model using LAST slash split (fix 9router bug: firstSlash breaks multi-slash models)
3. Build provider alias map (kr->kiro, cl->claude, etc.)
4. Model alias resolution from DB (user-defined name -> provider/model)
5. Combo detection: no slash means check combo registry first
6. Reserved prefix protection: user-defined prefixes cannot shadow built-in IDs
7. Edge cases: /model (empty provider error), provider/ (empty model error), a/b/c (provider=a, model=b/c)

## Rust Files
- src/provider/id.rs — ProviderId enum + alias resolution
- src/model/parser.rs — parse_model + error types
- src/model/combo.rs — ComboDetector

## Error Types
ParseModelError: Empty, UnknownProvider, EmptyModel, EmptyProvider

## Tests
- "gpt-4o" -> (OpenAI, "gpt-4o")
- "kr/claude-sonnet" -> (Kiro, "claude-sonnet")
- "/model" -> Err EmptyProvider
- "provider/" -> Err EmptyModel
- "a/b/c" -> (a, b/c) using last slash
- Unknown prefix -> Err UnknownProvider

## 9router Bugs Avoided
- Dead code combo re-detection (handleChat.js duplicated)
- Only firstSlash breaks multi-slash model names
- detectFormat misclassifies Claude as OpenAI enum prevents this
- Double parsing in wrapper + getModelInfoCore
close_reason: Implemented and verified. Codebase has feature with tests passing.

title: 4.1 - API Key System
description: HMAC-SHA256 with configurable secret. Format: sk-machineId-keyId-crc8. Timing-safe compare (crypto::eq). KeyId from crypto RNG. Configurable secret env var. Old format backward compat. Files: src/auth/api_key.rs. 9router fixes: HMAC secret hardcoded default, verifyApiKeyCrc dead code (never called), Math.random() for keyId (use OsRng), timing leak.
close_reason: Implemented and verified. Codebase has feature with tests passing.
